evals.name: parametric-box-with-lid
evals.prompt: Create a parametric box with lid, 100mm x 60mm x 40mm, with 2mm wall thickness and 4 M3 mounting holes in the corners.
evals.expected_output: OpenSCAD code with parametric variables at top, box body with cavity, lid, and 4 hole positions. Should include comments showing parameter ranges.

assertions.description: Has parametric variable for wall thickness

evals.name: l-bracket-with-holes
evals.prompt: Design an L-bracket that's 40mm wide, 30mm deep, 25mm tall, with 4mm thick walls and two M4 countersunk mounting holes in the base.
evals.expected_output: OpenSCAD code for L-shaped bracket with proper difference() operations for holes with countersinks.

evals.name: collision-detection
evals.prompt: I have two parts - a drawer that's 300mm x 200mm x 50mm and a cabinet interior of 320mm x 220mm x 60mm. Check if there's enough clearance between them and show me how to detect collisions.
evals.expected_output: OpenSCAD code demonstrating collision detection using intersection() and debug modifiers, with clearance calculation.

evals.name: label-on-face
evals.prompt: Add a 'FRONT' label to the top face of this cube: cube([50, 30, 20]); Show me both the BOSL2 attach method and a fallback without libraries.
evals.expected_output: Two versions of labeled cube code: one using BOSL2 attach(), one using manual translate/rotate positioning.

evals.name: export-with-params
evals.prompt: Export the attached model to STL for 3D printing. The model has a parameter 'width' that I want to set to 80mm instead of the default.
evals.expected_output: Command to export STL with parameter override: node scripts/export.mjs model.scad output.stl --params "width=80"

evals.name: extract-parameters
evals.prompt: What parameters can I customize in this OpenSCAD model? Extract all the tunable parameters with their ranges and default values.
evals.expected_output: JSON or table output showing parameter names, types, default values, and range/options from comment annotations.

evals.name: diagnose-error
evals.prompt: This OpenSCAD code has an error: 'ERROR: line 15: Unexpected semicolon'. Help me diagnose and fix it.
evals.expected_output: Analysis of error with suggestion for fix, potentially using diagnose.mjs to parse the error and provide guidance.

evals.name: multi-angle-preview
evals.prompt: Generate multi-angle preview images (isometric, front, top, sides) for my model to visually validate it before exporting.
evals.expected_output: Command to generate previews: node scripts/render.mjs model.scad ./previews/ with instructions to use read tool to examine each angle.
